description: N-terminal region upstream of exonuclease domain
notes: Contains residues 1-54 (truncated by c.138del); broader ExoD region begins at 223 (Atlas of Genetics)
Classical PPAP missense variants: P286R, V411L, L424V, S459F; broader ExoD region extends to 517 (Atlas of Genetics)
source: Church et al. 2013 HMG; Campbell et al. 2017 Cell

description: Linker between exonuclease and polymerase domains

notes: Leading strand DNA synthesis; corresponds to 140 kDa N-terminal catalytic fragment
POLE2/3/4 accessory subunit binding; CMG helicase interaction
source: Korona et al. 2011 JBC; Liu & Linn 2000 NAR (domain architecture)
